findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "start_session" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Use this first when a user wants to send or price a fax. PromptFax is built for irregular, pay-per-use outbound faxing: every real send requires a user-reviewed…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description tells the model to hide behavior
findings.detail: Description of "start_session" instructs the model to conceal actions from the user.

evidence.snippet: Use this first when a user wants to send or price a fax. PromptFax is built for irregular, pay-per-use outbound faxing: every real send requires a user-reviewed…

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "start_session" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "retry_failed_fax" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Use this after a retry-eligible failed fax to prepare a new authorization attempt.
